work_unit: 瞭望轮#10(卡死保护):9 worktree merge 可行性验证+L-002 fix 缺陷检出
situation: 连续第10轮瞭望,9 derived_fixes 全 pending,main behind=53/ahead=8。卡死保护触发(同状态≥3轮无进展)。跳出纯瞭望做增量验证:dry-run merge 测试所有 worktree 对当前 main HEAD 的合并可行性,并逐 worktree 检查 commit 完整性。
action: 1) clone+dry-run merge 测试 9 个 opt-*-shift-* worktree vs main HEAD(19e49ee);2) git diff-tree 检查每个 worktree 的文件改动路径;3) 发现 opt-scripts-shift-1782880738(L-002 fix,case-501)提交路径为绝对路径 home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio-aone/scripts/opt-worktree.sh(A 新增),正确路径 scripts/opt-worktree.sh 零改动→fix 无效且会污染 main;4) 确认其余 8 个 worktree 正确路径有实际改动,bogus 条目均从 base 继承非新增
outcome_evidence: dry-run merge 结果:9/9 clean merge;opt-scripts-shift-1782880738 commit 11a5f3c diff-tree 显示 A home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio-aone/scripts/opt-worktree.sh(绝对路径误作相对路径),git diff HEAD tip -- scripts/opt-worktree.sh 输出为空(零改动);其余 8 worktree diff numstat 均显示正确路径有 +N -M 改动
next_suggestion: REJECT opt-scripts-shift-1782880738(case-501,L-002):fix commit 写入错误绝对路径且正确文件未改动,merge 会污染 main。需重新派生 L-002 fix

MERGE 优先级(按 severity):H-001 case-494 opt-security-shift-1782878468 → H-005 case-495 opt-security-shift-1782878926 → M-002 case-496 opt-security-shift-1782879314 → M-001 case-497 opt-security-shift-1782879595 → M-003 case-498 opt-scripts-shift-1782879918 → M-004 case-499 opt-engine-shift-1782880189 → L-001 case-500 opt-engine-shift-1782880465 → L-003 case-502 opt-engine-shift-1782881018
main HEAD 已有 1 条历史遗留 bogus 绝对路径(home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio/.claude/memory/autonomous-state.md),建议在下一轮审计中清理

audit_findings.finding: opt-scripts-shift-1782880738(L-002 fix,case-501)commit 11a5f3c 将 files 参数以绝对路径传入 git add,导致新增文件路径为 home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio-aone/scripts/opt-worktree.sh(repo root 下的错误子目录),而正确路径 scripts/opt-worktree.sh 无任何改动。这恰好复现了 L-002 finding 本身描述的 bug(cd PROJECT 前未转绝对路径),fix 自证无效
audit_findings.remediation: reject case-501 worktree;重新派生 L-002 fix 时确保 opt-worktree.sh cmd_commit 在 cd PROJECT 前将所有 files 参数转为绝对路径(realpath/readlink -f)

audit_findings.finding: main HEAD tree 中存在历史遗留 bogus 绝对路径条目 home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio/.claude/memory/autonomous-state.md(blob 3bd0ef6d),非本轮引入但会在后续 merge 中持续存在
audit_findings.remediation: 下一轮审计或日常维护中 git rm 该条目并提交
